scripts.install:engine: cd apps/engine && python -m venv .venv && ./.venv/Scripts/pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/desktop && cd apps/engine && python -m uvicorn server:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 9000
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run setup -w apps/engine && npm run setup -w apps/desktop
